message:
fix(ci): Install exifr dependency for unit tests

The extracted functions module imports exifr for EXIF datetime parsing.
CI was failing because this dependency wasn't installed before running
the unit tests.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -67,6 +67,11 @@ jobs:
         with:
           node-version: '20'
 
+      - name: Install test dependencies
+        run: |
+          # The extracted functions module imports exifr for EXIF datetime parsing
+          npm install --no-save exifr
+
       - name: Run pure function unit tests
         run: |
           node --test scripts/tests/*.test.mjs
